title: KINGLAKE 8Pcs 4" Small Black Plant Pots Plastic Flower Pots Indoor Plant Pots for Office House Desk with Trays/Pallets
features: 【Dimensions and package contents】Oening diameter 10cm/4", bottom diameter 7cm/2.8", height 8.5cm/3.3"; there are 8pcs black plastic plant pots.

【Premium Durable Material】Flower pots are made of durable resin plastic which not easy to break and can reusable, and can withstand hot or cold weather, not easy to become brittle, melt or freeze crack.
【Drainage Holes】The bottom of flower pots has drainage holes, which is conducive to the respiration of root and drain excess water, and reduces the phenomenon of root entanglement, rotten roots.
【Separate Drip Trays】Platic flower pots are has saucers to collect the overflow water, soil and some other impurities. Don't worry about polluting the floor and keep the space clean.

【Wide Application】Plant pots are greatly suit for cultivating succulent plants, vegetables, fruit plants, flowers, cactus, herbs and other potted plants.You can put then in desk, window, etc, decorate your garden, balcony, office and room, etc.
